title: Eye of the Sun trilogy
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp}}
The '''Eye of the Sun trilogy''' written by [[Morrie Mullins (real person)|Morrie Mullins]], launched the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|''Living Force'']] campaign. It introduced the players to the planet [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]], the towns of [[Gadrin and Hedrett]], and the [[Hiironi irstat]]. The trilogy featured the heroes helping [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin's]] residents to uncover illegal actions taken by the [[Metatheran Cartel]]'s rogue leader, [[Velin Wir]].

The adventures debuted at the [[Winter Fantasy 2001]] convention, and were supported by some articles on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website.

==Contents==
*[[Eye of the Sun: A Cularin Presence|''A Cularin Presence'']]
*[[Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within|''The Resistance Within'']]
*[[Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation|''A Revelation'']]
*''[[An Uneasy Peace]]'' {{C|associated interactive}}
